name: Garbanzo-Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: 15 ounce can garbanzo beans, rinsed and drained
1 medium cucumber, halved lengthwise and sliced
1/2 cup pitted ripe olives, halved lengthwise
2 teaspoons snipped fresh mint or 1/2 teaspoon dried mint flakes, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine garbanzo beans, cucumber, olives, red onion, and parsley.
2. For dressing, in a screw-top jar, combine oil, vinegar, sugar, lemon peel, juice, garlic, mint, and salt.
3. Cover and shake well to mix. Pour dressing over vegetables, tossing to coat.
4. Cover and chill for 4-24 hours, stirring occasionally to mix.
5. To serve, line a salad bowl with lettuce leaves. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the vegetables to the salad bowl; discard the dressing.
6. Makes 4 side-dish salad servings.
7. Per serving: 228 calories, 15 grams fat, 0 mg. cholesterol, 555 mg. sodium.
